60秒任务: 「优先级」：背景/优先级/风险/行动项；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 优先级｜风险｜资源｜时间线｜行动项｜责任分配
场景族: 办公室｜会议室｜远程会议｜走廊对话｜协作工具界面
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Which task should we prioritize?（询问优先级）
This is urgent, but is it important?（区分紧急与重要）
I’d put ___ at the top of the list.（排序）
We may need to deprioritize ___.（降优先级）
What can wait until next week?（延后任务）
If we do this first, ___ may slip.（指出代价）
The deadline makes ___ more pressing.（解释紧迫性）
Let’s rank these by impact and effort.（按影响与投入排序）
I don’t think everything can be a priority.（挑战泛化优先级）
What’s the trade-off here?（询问取舍）
We need a clear decision on priority.（要求决策）
Can we agree on the top three?（确认前三）
This matters more because ___.（说明理由）
Let’s focus on what unblocks the team.（聚焦解阻）
I’ll update the plan based on that.（执行更新）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: priority, deadline, impact, effort, trade-off, task, backlog, dependency
Verbs: prioritize, rank, delay, focus, unblock, update, decide, escalate
Adjectives / Status: urgent, important, low-impact, high-risk, realistic, pressing
Time / Place: today, next week, by end of day, this sprint, in the tracker
Chunks: top of the list, can wait, trade-off, impact and effort, clear decision
